product.description: Bateta Pau is a spicy and satisfying Gujarati-style potato sandwich that's bursting with flavor. Soft, toasted buns are filled with a flavorful mashed potato mixture seasoned with mustard seeds, curry leaves, green chilies, and turmeric. Often served with chutneys and fried green chilies, this humble yet delicious street food is crispy, tangy, and comforting—all in one bite. A perfect snack or light meal that captures the bold essence of Indian street flavors.
Classic Club Sandwich is a triple-layered sandwich filled with chicken, lettuce, tomato, and mayo, served with crispy bread.
Creamy, rich chocolate ice cream with a smooth, indulgent flavor.
Delicious pizza is a cheesy, flavorful dish topped with fresh ingredients on a soft, crispy crust.

Manchurian Soup is a bold and flavorful Indo-Chinese fusion soup known for its spicy, tangy, and umami-rich taste. It features crispy vegetable or chicken Manchurian balls simmered in a thick, savory broth made from soy sauce, garlic, ginger, green chilies, and spring onions. The soup has a slightly thick consistency, often achieved with cornflour, and is garnished with fresh coriander or chopped scallions. It’s a perfect appetizer that offers a balance of crunch from the Manchurian balls and warmth from the spicy broth—ideal for lovers of spicy, street-style Indo-Chinese cuisine.

Cocoa Crush is a creamy, chocolatey drink with a rich cocoa flavor and a smooth, indulgent taste.

Ricotta e SpinaciA classic Italian delight, Ricotta e Spinaci features tender pasta pockets (like ravioli or cannelloni) filled with creamy ricotta cheese and finely chopped spinach. The rich and velvety filling is delicately seasoned with nutmeg, salt, and pepper, offering a perfect balance of freshness and indulgence. Often served with a light butter sage sauce or a tangy tomato base, this dish is a comforting and flavorful vegetarian favorite.

Manchurian is a popular Indo-Chinese dish known for its bold flavors, crispy texture, and savory sauce. It typically consists of deep-fried balls made from finely chopped vegetables (like cabbage, carrot, and capsicum) or chicken, mixed with spices and flour. These crispy balls are then tossed in a tangy, spicy, and umami-rich sauce made with soy sauce, garlic, ginger, green chilies, and spring onions. Manchurian can be served dry as a starter or with gravy as a main dish, often paired with fried rice or noodles. It’s a street food favorite, loved for its punchy flavor and satisfying bite.
Blueberry Shake is a creamy, sweet drink made by blending fresh blueberries with milk and ice cream.

Delicate pillows of ravioli filled with rich cheese or seasoned meat, gently tossed in a luscious creamy Tuscan sauce. This indulgent sauce blends garlic-infused cream with sun-dried tomatoes, spinach, parmesan, and a touch of Italian herbs, creating a velvety texture and bold, savory flavor. The ravioli soak up the sauce beautifully, delivering a burst of creamy, tangy, and earthy goodness in every bite. A luxurious and comforting Italian dish that’s both elegant and satisfying.
ChocoBuzz is a rich and creamy chocolate coffee blend that combines bold espresso with smooth cocoa, delivering a delightful buzz of sweetness and energy in every sip.

Indulge in our rich, creamy cup ice cream, served in a convenient single-serve cup that's perfect for any occasion. Made with premium ingredients and available in a variety of classic and seasonal flavors like vanilla, chocolate, strawberry, mango, and butterscotch. Each scoop is velvety smooth, delightfully refreshing, and guaranteed to satisfy your sweet cravings. Ideal for quick treats, parties, or on-the-go enjoyment.
Chocolate dessert is a sweet treat made with rich cocoa or chocolate, offering a creamy, indulgent flavor.
Delicious Pizza is a cheesy, flavorful dish topped with fresh ingredients on a crispy, soft crust.

Pav Bhaji is a rich, spicy, and buttery street food dish that originated in Mumbai and is now loved all across India. It consists of a thick, mashed vegetable curry (bhaji) served hot with soft, butter-toasted bread rolls called pav.

Lassi is a traditional Indian yogurt-based drink that is popular throughout the Indian subcontinent. It is made by blending yogurt with water, spices, and sometimes fruit or sugar. Lassi can be sweet or salty:Sweet lassi is flavored with sugar, cardamom, rose water, or fruits like mango.Salty lassi is seasoned with salt, cumin, and sometimes herbs like mint.

Jamun Shot Juice is a vibrant, tangy health drink made from the juice of fresh Jamun (Indian black plum or Java plum). Packed with flavor and nutrients, it’s served in small "shot" portions, offering a quick, zesty burst of wellness and taste.
Chocolate Cake is a rich, moist dessert made with cocoa or melted chocolate, layered or topped with creamy frosting, offering a deliciously sweet and indulgent treat.

Golden-brown rings of tender calamari, lightly coated in a seasoned batter and deep-fried to crispy perfection. Served hot and crunchy, this seafood delight is paired with zesty marinara sauce or tangy aioli for dipping, making it an irresistible appetizer or snack with a satisfying crunch in every bite.

Chhole Bhature is a beloved Punjabi dish that combines spicy, tangy chickpea curry (chhole) with soft, fluffy, deep-fried bread (bhature). The chhole are simmered in a blend of aromatic spices, tomatoes, and onions, while the bhature are made from fermented dough, giving them a light and airy texture. Best enjoyed hot with onions, green chilies, and a side of pickle – it's a satisfying and indulgent meal.

Thepla is a popular and healthy Gujarati delicacy made using whole wheat flour, fresh fenugreek leaves (methi), yogurt, and a mix of traditional Indian spices. It is thin, soft, and mildly spiced, often enjoyed with pickle, curd, or tea. Thepla is not only delicious but also travel-friendly, making it a favorite for road trips and lunch boxes.

Red Velvet Cake is a luxurious, velvety-soft dessert known for its striking deep red color, mild cocoa flavor, and incredibly moist, tender crumb. It's traditionally layered with a smooth, tangy cream cheese frosting, which perfectly balances its subtle sweetness.
Paneer Chilli is a spicy Indo-Chinese dish made with fried paneer cubes tossed in a tangy, flavorful sauce with onions and capsicum.

Daily Drip is a smooth, aromatic coffee brewed fresh each day to kickstart your mornings. With a balanced flavor and comforting warmth, it’s the perfect everyday cup to keep you energized and focused.

Rich, aromatic, and energizing, coffee is a beloved beverage made from roasted coffee beans. With its bold flavor and comforting warmth, coffee can be enjoyed in many forms—from a smooth espresso shot to a creamy latte or a refreshing iced brew. It offers a perfect balance of bitterness and subtle sweetness, often accompanied by notes of chocolate, nuts, fruit, or spice depending on the bean origin and roast. Whether sipped slowly in the morning or grabbed on-the-go, coffee is a daily ritual and a source of focus for millions around the world.

The cookies are golden-brown, soft on the inside, and loaded with rich, melty chocolate chips. Served on a rustic wooden tray, the comforting aroma of the cookies blends beautifully with the bold scent of freshly brewed coffee. Ideal for a relaxing break or an afternoon pick-me-up, this duo delivers warmth, sweetness, and a satisfying crunch in every bite.

Delicious pizza is a baked flatbread topped with cheese, tomato sauce, and various toppings like vegetables, meats, or herbs. It’s crispy, cheesy, and full of flavor, loved for its rich taste and endless variety.

Punjabi Paneer Shaak is a traditional North Indian vegetarian dish made with soft cubes of paneer (Indian cottage cheese) cooked in a rich, flavorful gravy of tomatoes, onions, garlic, and ginger. This dish is seasoned with classic Punjabi spices like turmeric, cumin, red chili powder, coriander, and garam masala, which give it a bold, aromatic taste. The curry is thick, hearty, and perfectly spiced — making it a comforting and protein-rich dish.It is commonly served hot with Indian breads such as roti or naan, or with steamed basmati rice. A staple in Punjabi households, Paneer Shaak is enjoyed both as an everyday meal and during festive occasions.

Paneer Shaak is a traditional Punjabi vegetarian dish made with soft, fresh paneer (Indian cottage cheese) simmered in a richly spiced tomato-onion gravy. It's cooked with classic Punjabi spices like turmeric, cumin, coriander powder, red chili, garlic, and ginger, which give it a deep, aromatic flavor. The dish is hearty, flavorful, and packed with protein, making it a favorite in Punjabi households. It's typically served hot with roti, naan, or steamed rice, and is perfect for both everyday meals and special occasions.
Veg Cheese Biryani is a delicious fusion dish made with fragrant basmati rice, mixed vegetables, aromatic spices, and melted cheese for a rich, creamy twist.

This image shows a delicious pepperoni pizza with a golden-brown crust, topped generously with melted, stretchy mozzarella cheese and evenly spaced slices of pepperoni. One slice is being pulled away, showcasing the gooey cheese stretch—a hallmark of a hot, freshly baked pizza. The crust looks perfectly baked with a slight char, and the tomato sauce beneath the cheese peeks through in places, adding to its mouthwatering appeal. The pizza is placed on a dark baking tray, enhancing the vibrant colors of the toppings and cheese.
Dal Makhani is a creamy Punjabi lentil dish made with black lentils, kidney beans, butter, and spices. It’s rich, flavorful, and best enjoyed with naan or rice.
Mocktails are refreshing, non-alcoholic drinks made with a mix of juices, sodas, and flavorful ingredients.
Jalebi is a popular sweet treat enjoyed across South Asia, the Middle East, and parts of North Africa. It is known for its bright orange or golden color, crispy texture, and rich sweetness.
Spicy Chicken Roast is a flavorful dish made with marinated chicken roasted to perfection with hot, aromatic spices.

Lightly spiced and pan-cooked to perfection, it’s a versatile dish that can be enjoyed hot or cold—perfect for breakfast, travel snacks, or a quick meal. Served with yogurt, pickle, or chai, Thepla is wholesome, aromatic, and full of comforting, home-style taste.

Momos are a type of dumpling, popular in South Asian cuisine, particularly in Nepal, Tibet, Bhutan, and parts of India. They are typically filled with minced meat, such as chicken, beef, or pork, or sometimes with vegetables for a vegetarian version. The dough is soft, chewy, and slightly elastic.

Punjabi cuisine is known for its rich, flavorful, and hearty dishes that reflect the vibrant culture of Punjab, a region in northern India. It features a wide variety of both vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes, often cooked with generous amounts of ghee (clarified butter), butter, and spices.

A milkshake is a cold, creamy, and indulgent beverage made by blending milk, ice cream, and flavorings such as chocolate, vanilla, strawberry, or fruit syrups. Smooth and rich in texture, milkshakes are a favorite treat for all ages, offering a perfect balance of sweetness and chill. Often topped with whipped cream, sprinkles, or chocolate syrup, they are both refreshing and satisfying—ideal as a dessert or a fun, flavorful drink any time of day.

It’s a popular choice for lunch or dinner in many parts of South Asia.

Tomato Soup is a smooth, rich, and comforting soup made from ripe, juicy tomatoes cooked down to a velvety consistency. Flavored with garlic, onion, and herbs like basil or thyme, it has a perfect balance of tangy and slightly sweet notes. Often blended to a creamy texture, it may be enriched with butter or cream for added richness. Served hot, it pairs wonderfully with croutons, fresh cream swirls, or a side of grilled cheese. Tomato soup is a classic favorite that’s both soothing and satisfying—perfect for all seasons.

A hearty and comforting Italian classic, lasagna with meat sauce is a layered pasta dish made with tender sheets of lasagna noodles, rich and savory meat sauce, creamy béchamel or ricotta cheese, and a generous topping of melted mozzarella and parmesan. The meat sauce is slow-cooked with ground beef (or a blend of beef and pork), onions, garlic, tomatoes, and Italian herbs, creating a deep, flavorful base. Each bite delivers a perfect balance of meaty, cheesy, and saucy goodness, baked until golden and bubbling. Perfect for family dinners or special occasions.

Panipuri – also known as Golgappa, Puchka, or Gupchup in various regions of India – is a beloved Indian street food made of small, hollow, and crispy puris filled with a spicy, tangy, and flavorful mixture.

Gulab Jamun is a beloved Indian dessert made from soft, melt-in-the-mouth milk solids (khoya) shaped into small round balls, deep-fried to a golden brown, and soaked in a fragrant sugar syrup flavored with cardamom, rose water, and saffron. These syrupy delights are rich, indulgent, and bursting with sweetness in every bite. Often served warm and garnished with slivers of almonds or pistachios, Gulab Jamun is a festive favorite and a symbol of celebration in Indian cuisine.

A hearty and flavorful North Indian classic made with tender chickpeas simmered in a rich, spiced tomato-onion gravy. Infused with aromatic spices like cumin, coriander, garam masala, and a touch of amchur (dry mango powder) for that signature tang, this dish is bold, comforting, and deeply satisfying. Often served with fluffy bhature, steamed rice, or soft roti, Chole Chana is a beloved vegetarian staple that delivers a perfect balance of spice, texture, and warmth in every bite.
Egg Curry is a flavorful dish made with boiled eggs simmered in a spicy onion-tomato gravy, infused with aromatic Indian spices.

Green tea is a type of tea made from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant, which undergo minimal oxidation during processing. It is known for its delicate flavor and numerous health benefits, largely due to its high concentration of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG (epigallocatechin gallate).

Infused with premium ingredients like chunks of chocolate, fresh fruits, or warm spices (depending on the variety), these muffins are moist on the inside with a golden, slightly crisp top. Whether served warm with a dollop of butter or enjoyed on the go, they deliver homemade comfort in every bite — truly a delightful indulgence you can’t resist.

Hints of garlic, ginger, and festive spices like cinnamon or nutmeg add a cozy, celebratory twist. Garnished with a touch of cream, fresh herbs, or crispy croutons, this soup is a comforting and flavorful way to start any holiday meal or enjoy a special occasion with loved ones.

Split Pea Soup is a hearty and comforting dish made from dried green or yellow split peas simmered until soft and creamy. It features a thick, smooth texture and a rich, earthy flavor. Often cooked with aromatic vegetables like onions, carrots, and celery, it may also include herbs like thyme or bay leaves for added depth. Some versions are made with smoked meats like ham or bacon, adding a savory, smoky taste, while vegetarian versions highlight the natural sweetness of the peas. Served hot, this wholesome soup is perfect for chilly days and nourishing meals.

The tea is brewed with aromatic spices like ginger, cardamom, and cloves, offering a rich and soothing taste. The samosa, with its flaky pastry shell, is filled with a spiced mixture of mashed potatoes, peas, and herbs, fried to perfection. A wholesome and refreshing layered delight, the Greek Yogurt & Berry Parfait combines creamy, protein-rich Greek yogurt with a medley of fresh berries like strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries. Each layer is beautifully stacked with crunchy granola, adding a satisfying texture and a touch of natural sweetness. Blueberry Lavender Cake is a soft, fragrant dessert infused with lavender and topped with sweet, juicy blueberries.

Sizzling over open flames, this street-style roasted corn on the cob is a smoky and spicy delight. Each ear of corn is char-grilled to perfection, giving it beautiful blackened spots and a rich, smoky aroma. It's then generously coated with a zesty mix of chili powder, lemon juice, salt, and chaat masala, and sprinkled with fresh herbs for an extra burst of flavor. A favorite monsoon snack in India, this fiery treat is perfect for those who love bold, tangy, and spicy flavors in every bite.

Kachori is a deep-fried, crispy, and flaky Indian snack stuffed with a spicy and flavorful filling. The outer layer is made from refined wheat flour (maida) and is golden-brown and crunchy. The stuffing varies by region and can include ingredients like spiced lentils (moong dal or urad dal), onion, peas, or even potato. It’s often served hot with tangy tamarind chutney, spicy green chutney, or aloo sabzi (potato curry). Popular across North and West India, kachori is a beloved street food and a festive favorite.
Chocolate Brownie Milkshake is a rich, creamy drink blended with milk, ice cream, and chunks of fudgy brownie.

Pizza is a delicious, savory dish originating from Italy, typically made with a round, flat base of dough, topped with a variety of ingredients. The most classic version is the Margherita, which features a simple topping of tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella cheese, basil leaves, and a drizzle of olive oil.

Pasta is a type of Italian food made from durum wheat flour and water, and sometimes egg. It's shaped into a variety of forms, each designed to hold sauces and flavors in a unique way. The dough is typically rolled into thin sheets or extruded through molds to create shapes like spaghetti (long, thin strands), penne (short tubes), fusilli (twisted spirals), and farfalle (bow-tie shaped). Pasta can be served in numerous ways, often with a sauce, such as marinara, Alfredo, pesto, or carbonara. It's versatile, comforting, and can be a base for both simple and elaborate dishes.

A beloved Indian street food delight, Panipuri is a burst of flavor in every bite. Crispy, hollow puris are filled with a tangy and spicy mix of flavored water (pani), mashed potatoes, chickpeas, tamarind chutney, and aromatic spices. Each puri is a perfect balance of crunch, spice, and refreshment—an irresistible snack that excites the taste buds and leaves you craving more. Best enjoyed fresh and fast, Panipuri is more than a snack—it's an experience!

Kachori is a deep-fried, golden, and flaky pastry filled with a savory spiced mixture—typically made with lentils, onions, or peas. Crispy on the outside and bursting with bold, tangy flavors on the inside, it’s a popular Indian snack enjoyed across regions. Whether served with chutneys, yogurt, or as part of a chaat, kachori offers a satisfying crunch and a rich, spicy taste that makes it a timeless street food favorite.

It’s layered or topped with a colorful mix of fresh fruits like bananas, apples, grapes, and berries, adding a natural sweetness and juicy texture. Each spoonful offers a harmonious balance of rich chocolate, silky custard, and vibrant fruitiness—making it a luxurious yet refreshing treat for any occasion.

A crispy, golden triangle of deliciousness, the samosa is a popular Indian snack stuffed with a savory filling of spiced potatoes, peas, and herbs. Wrapped in a thin, flaky pastry and deep-fried to perfection, each bite offers a satisfying crunch followed by a burst of flavorful warmth. Served hot with tangy tamarind or mint chutney, samosas are the ultimate comfort food—perfect as a snack, appetizer, or street food favorite.

Wrapped in a paper-thin soy-infused crepe, the Chience Roll is stuffed with sous-vide Szechuan chicken, flash-pickled daikon, and wasabi microfoam. As you bite in, a controlled chemical reaction releases a slow-burning chili mist that tingles the senses and activates your taste neurons like never before.

Dive into a vibrant blend of nature’s finest fruits with this Tropical Fusion Bliss juice. The sweet, juicy mango dances with the tart tang of pineapple, while zesty orange and a hint of lime bring a refreshing citrus kick. To round it off, a subtle splash of coconut milk adds creamy richness that perfectly balances the tangy notes. It’s like a tropical vacation in every sip — bright, refreshing, and bursting with flavor!
Burger

Ein köstlicher Genuss aus saftigen Heidelbeeren und feinem Kokos – diese Kombination vereint fruchtige Frische mit exotischer Süße. Die Heidelbeeren sorgen für eine natürliche, leicht säuerliche Note, während die Kokosraspeln eine cremige, tropische Tiefe hinzufügen. Ob in Muffins, Kuchen oder Desserts – Heidelbeer-Kokos ist eine harmonische Geschmacksexplosion, die sowohl erfrischt als auch verwöhnt. Perfekt für alle, die das Besondere lieben!

A delicious fusion snack that combines the softness of traditional rotli (Indian flatbread) with the gooey richness of melted cheese. Filled with a flavorful mix of veggies, spices, and a generous layer of cheese, this roll is lightly toasted for the perfect crisp bite. Ideal as a quick snack, kids' lunchbox treat, or a cheesy comfort food fix with an Indian twist.

Veg Manchurian is a popular Indo-Chinese dish made of deep-fried vegetable balls tossed in a spicy, tangy soy-based sauce. It’s served dry as a starter or with gravy as a main course, often paired with fried rice or noodles.

Spicy Veg Biryani is a flavorful Indian rice dish made with basmati rice, mixed vegetables, and aromatic spices like biryani masala, saffron, and herbs. It’s cooked in layers and known for its rich taste and spicy kick.

A rich, creamy blend of premium ice cream and fresh milk, whipped to silky perfection. Served ice-cold and topped with a generous swirl of whipped cream, this timeless treat is as smooth as it is satisfying—perfect for sipping through a straw or enjoying with a spoon. Choose from classic flavors like vanilla, chocolate, and strawberry, or try a specialty twist for an indulgent experience.
Hello

Tender fillet of fish marinated in zesty lemon and aromatic herbs, grilled to perfection, and finished with a rich garlic butter glaze. Served with a side of sautéed vegetables and seasoned rice for a wholesome seafood experience.
Dosa
Masala Fries are crispy potato fries tossed in a blend of spicy Indian seasonings, offering a perfect mix of crunch and bold flavor.

Chinese meal served in a traditional stainless steel thali. The plate includes:1. Veg Fried Rice – A fragrant and colorful mix of long-grain basmati rice stir-fried with mixed vegetables like carrots, green peas, and capsicum, along with scrambled egg and small fried veggie balls. It’s lightly seasoned with soy sauce and pepper, giving it a perfect balance of flavor and aroma.2. Gobi Manchurian (Dry) – Crispy cauliflower florets deep-fried and tossed in a spicy, tangy sauce made with soy sauce, chili sauce, garlic, ginger, and bell peppers. Garnished with fresh coriander, it offers a satisfying crunch with bold flavors.
Plat senegalais riz sauce gombo
Paneer
Freshly brewed coffee crafted with care for rich, authentic flavor.
Chilli Dry Chicken is a spicy Indo-Chinese dish made with fried chicken pieces tossed in a hot, tangy sauce with onions, capsicum, and chilies.
Cvvv
double burger

This vibrant and refreshing Mango Lassi is a creamy blend of ripe mango pulp, thick yogurt, and a touch of sugar, creating the perfect balance of fruity sweetness and tang. Topped with chopped dry fruits like pistachios and almonds, and infused with saffron strands and rose petals, it adds a royal touch to this traditional Indian summer drink. Served chilled, this lassi is not only a treat for the taste buds but also a delightful way to cool down on a hot day.
product.productName: Mango Lassi with Dry Fruits & Saffron

product.description: Yummy Burger is a juicy, flavorful burger loaded with fresh veggies, melted cheese, and tangy sauces, all tucked inside a soft, toasted bun — a perfect bite of satisfaction!
Spicy Tandoori Chicken is a juicy, flavorful dish made with chicken marinated in yogurt and bold Indian spices, then grilled or roasted to smoky perfection.

Strawberry Milkshake is a creamy, sweet, and refreshing drink made by blending fresh or frozen strawberries with chilled milk and sugar. Often topped with whipped cream or a scoop of vanilla ice cream, it has a smooth texture and a rich, fruity flavor. The shake is naturally pink in color and bursting with the sweet and slightly tangy taste of ripe strawberries. Served cold, it’s a classic favorite—perfect for summer days or as a delightful treat any time of the year.

Black coffee is a strong, bold brew made without milk, offering a pure and rich coffee flavor.
Bug
This is spicy 🔥..

Coffee with a Heart Shape is a beautifully presented cup of coffee, typically a latte or cappuccino, featuring a delicate heart design formed with steamed milk over a rich espresso base. This heart-shaped latte art adds a personal and artistic touch, symbolizing warmth, love, and care. The creamy milk blends harmoniously with the bold espresso, creating a smooth and well-balanced flavor. Often served in cafés, it’s not just a drink but an experience—inviting, comforting, and visually delightful. Perfect for cozy moments or sharing with someone special.
